results.rawReport:
# Research Report: best practices for building REST APIs with Node.js
*Generated by DevOS — 2026-03-09 09:19:24*

## Executive Summary

The key insights include using Express.js for simplicity and flexibility, implementing proper error handling and validation for robust responses, and securing the API with authentication mechanisms such as JWT.

## Key Insights

1. Use Express.js for building REST APIs in Node.js due to its simplicity and flexibility.
   Source: Best Practices for Building REST APIs with Node.js
2. Implement proper error handling and validation to ensure robust API responses.
   Source: Backend Best Practices for Building REST APIs with Node.js
3. Secure your API by using authentication mechanisms like JWT (JSON Web Tokens).
   Source: Node.js Best Practices for Building REST APIs

## Sources

1. https://www.bing.com/search?q=best+practices+for+building+REST+APIs+with+Node.js
2. https://www.bing.com/search?q=backend+best+practices+for+building+REST+APIs+with+Node.js
3. https://www.bing.com/search?q=node+best+practices+for+building+REST+APIs+with+Node.js
